case_title: ANDERSON, SAMANTHA vs. COSTA, BLANCY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, SAMANTHA AS TO DEFENDANT COSTA, BLANCY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-19-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-18-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-29-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-19-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE OSC ON PLTF'S ATTY IRA FREYDKIS FOR POS TO BE FILED. HEARING SET FOR JUN-25-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-25-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, SAMANTHA HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, SAMANTHA

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF JUL-17-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER SETTING FORTH: 1) LEGAL SERIOUS CONSEQUENCES LANGUAGE; 2) FURTHER STATUS CONFERENCE DATE; 3) FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH FAST TRACK RULES COULD RESULT IN SANCTIONS, INCLUDING DISMISSAL.
ORDER RE:MOTION TO WITHDRAW --SEE ORDER FOR MORE INF GRANTED --2-- JUDGE QUIDACHAY
PROOF OF SERVICE (RE: MOTION TO WITHDRAW) BY MAIL TO SAMANTHA ANDERSON (PLAINTIFF) FILED BY ATTORNY IRA FREYDKIS

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-20-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLTF IN PRO PER. SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, PER GRANTED MOTION TO WITHDRAW.: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR FREYDKIS, IRA ALEX AS ATTORNEY FOR ANDERSON, SAMANTHA

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-08-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-08-1997, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE. $200 SANCTION TO PLTF IN PRO PER, SAMANTHA ANDERSON. OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-25-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-25-1997, TO FILE POS OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-10-1997 CONTINUED FROM NOV-25-1997 TO FEB-04-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-04-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-04-1998, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT TO BE FILE 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING OCS TO PLTF. SAMANTHA ANDERSON IN PRO PER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-1998 CONTINUED FROM FEB-04-1998 TO MAR-25-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
